recommendations.title: The Music Never Stopped

recommendations.title: Fort Bliss
recommendations.overview: After returning home from an extended tour in Afghanistan, a decorated U.S. Army medic and single mother struggles to rebuild her relationship with her young son.

recommendations.title: A Love Song for Bobby Long
recommendations.overview: A headstrong young woman returns to New Orleans after the death of her estranged mother.

recommendations.title: Live and Let Die
recommendations.overview: James Bond must investigate a mysterious murder case of a British agent in New Orleans. Soon he finds himself up against a gangster boss named Mr. Big.

recommendations.title: Black Beauty
recommendations.overview: Born free in the American West, Black Beauty is a horse rounded up and brought to Birtwick Stables, where she meets spirited teenager Jo Green. The two forge a bond that carries Beauty through the different chapters, challenges and adventures.

recommendations.title: Max
recommendations.overview: A dog that helped soldiers in Afghanistan returns to the U.S. and is adopted by his handler's family after suffering a traumatic experience.

recommendations.title: Captain America: The Winter Soldier
recommendations.overview: After the cataclysmic events in New York with The Avengers, Steve Rogers, aka Captain America is living quietly in Washington, D.C. and trying to adjust to the modern world. But when a S.H.I.E.L.D. colleague comes under attack, Steve becomes embroile

recommendations.title: Storm Boy
recommendations.overview: Storm Boy lives a lonely life with his reclusive father on a desolate coastline, but when he forms a close bond with a pelican, Mr. Percival, his life takes a new and unexpected turn.

recommendations.title: Kiss Me, Stupid

recommendations.title: Song One
